channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Behind the Scenes of the 1994 US World Cup: Organisers, Players and Unforgettable Moments
item.description: The 1994 FIFA World Cup in the United States was a landmark event that transformed soccer in the country, but it was also a summer of chaos, celebrity mishaps and logistical challenges. Scott LeTellie...

item.title: Super Eagles Group L Fixtures Against Madagascar, Tanzania, and Guinea Bissau in 2027 AFCON Qualifiers
item.description: Nigeria's Super Eagles don land for Group L alongside Tanzania, Madagascar, and Guinea Bissau for the 2027 Africa Cup of Nations qualifiers, wey dem go jointly host with Kenya and Uganda. The draw hap...

item.title: Timmins faces difficulty recruiting doctors due to regional shortages
item.description: The city of Timmins, Ontario, is currently facing a significant challenge in healthcare due to a shortage of physicians, highlighted by the experiences of its sole ophthalmologist. Recruitment of new ...

item.title: The Cardiff Giant: The Story Behind America’s Famous 19th-Century Hoax
item.description: The Cardiff Giant was a 10-foot-tall gypsum statue that became one of the most notorious archaeological hoaxes in U.S. history. It was “discovered” on October 16, 1869, on a farm in Cardiff, New York,...

item.title: Former Employee Alleges Threats Over Royal Connections at Sarah Ferguson-Associated Start-up
item.description: A former contractor at the failed lifestyle app vVoosh has alleged that Manuel Fernandez, a close friend and business partner of Sarah Ferguson, used his royal connections to threaten him with impriso...

item.title: IHC Adjourns Hearing of Imaan and Hadi’s Sentence Suspension Requests Until After Eid
item.description: On Wednesday, the Islamabad High Court (IHC) issued notices regarding multiple applications seeking early hearings of sentence suspension pleas filed by human rights lawyers Imaan Zainab Mazari-Hazir ...

item.title: Cleric Hails Oloyede for Transforming JAMB into Model Public Institution
item.description: An Imam for the National Mosque, Abuja, Abdulkadir Solagberu, don praise the work of Prof. Is-haq Oloyede, the Registrar of JAMB, say him don make the examination body correct example for other public...

item.title: Using DNA Analysis of Scat to Protect the Critically Endangered Gilbert’s Potoroo
item.description: Researchers in Western Australia are applying advanced DNA analysis techniques to support conservation efforts for Gilbert’s potoroo, one of the world’s rarest marsupials, with fewer than 150 individu...

item.title: Dr. Amir Khan advises caution with supplements due to risk of overdose and inconsistent dosing
item.description: Dr. Amir Khan has raised concerns about the safety of certain dietary supplements, emphasizing that the industry is not regulated like medicines. Speaking on ITV's Lorraine, he highlighted that many s...

item.title: James Hunt Strikes Track Marshal After Collision at 1977 Canadian Grand Prix
item.description: During the 1977 Canadian Grand Prix at Mosport Park, Formula 1 driver James Hunt became infamous for his aggressive behavior on the track. While battling for the lead against Mario Andretti, Hunt atte...

item.title: Guide to Applying for the August 2026 Civil Service Exam in the Philippines
item.description: Filipinos aiming for entry-level government positions, including K to 12 graduates, can apply for the Career Service Examination–Pen and Paper Test (CSE-PPT) scheduled on August 9, 2026. The Civil Ser...

item.title: Pakistan declares May 26–28 as public holidays for Eid ul Adha 2026
item.description: ISLAMABAD: The federal government of Pakistan has officially announced that May 26, 27, and 28, 2026, will be public holidays in observance of Eid ul Adha. This declaration came through a notification...

item.title: Brexit Supporters Reflect on the Challenges and Failures Since the Referendum
item.description: Nearly a decade after the Brexit referendum, the Freedom Association convened its 'Brexit Unleashed' conference in Westminster, attracting around 120 mostly elderly supporters still committed to the c...

item.title: Reuben Wu Illuminates Landscapes with Drone-Mounted Lights in 'Siren'
item.description: Reuben Wu, a photographer originally from Liverpool and now based in Chicago, creates striking images by using drone-mounted lights to illuminate remote landscapes, a technique he calls 'Aeroglyphs.' ...

item.title: Oden Ewa Emerges Winner of APC Cross River Central Senatorial Primary as Two Aspirants Reject Outcome
item.description: Two APC aspirants for Cross River Central Senatorial District, Eteng Jones Williams and Ms Mary Ekpere, don reject the primary election results wey dey circulate for social media. Dem talk say no prim...

item.title: Sen. John Curtis Signals Concern Over Trump’s Ambassador Picks Kari Lake and Doug Mastriano
item.description: Senator John Curtis (R-UT) has expressed concerns regarding two of former President Donald Trump’s controversial ambassadorial nominees, Kari Lake and Doug Mastriano. Curtis, who serves on the Senate ...

item.title: Rwanda and Tanzania Sign MoU to Strengthen Energy Cooperation
item.description: On May 19, 2026, Rwanda and Tanzania took an important step in boosting regional energy collaboration by signing a Memorandum of Understanding (MoU). The event was witnessed by Presidents Paul Kagame ...

item.title: Daesung Lee’s 'Nirvana' Explores Resilience and Humor in the Lives of Korean Women Through Portraits with His Mother
item.description: In 'Nirvana,' Korean photographer Daesung Lee collaborates with his mother, Yi-Boun Shin, to explore the hidden lives and resilience of women from her generation. The project was inspired by a profoun...

item.title: Umar Hayat sentenced to additional two-year imprisonment in arms case linked to Sana Yousaf murder
item.description: ISLAMABAD: In a significant development in the high-profile Sana Yousaf murder case, Umar Hayat, already convicted for killing the teenage TikTok star, has been sentenced to an additional two years in...

item.title: Dismissed Karachi constable who helped arrest drug suspect Pinky may be reinstated
item.description: A police constable in Karachi, who was previously dismissed over allegations of accepting bribes from a suspected drug operator known as Anmol alias Pinky, may be reinstated following his reported rol...
